general_info.definition: Nitrogen doped Graphene quantum Dots dispersed in a 1-hexyl-3-methylimidazolium tryptophan ionic liquid(TryIL)

post_treatment: mixture (50.0 ml N-GQD, 0.050g NaOH, 0.050g  1-hexyl-3-methylimidazolium tryptophan(TryIL) ionic liquid)

applications.comparative_advantage: Better stability compared to developed methods

feedback.label: Good
feedback.expert_comment: High Scientific Context: Quantitative data was extracted with high precision. The model successfully preserved scientific context (e.g., relating Quantum Yield to its reference material) and handled value ranges/uncertainties as requested in the 'Data Quality' section. | Applicability Verified: The extracted aplication domains align perfectly with those mentioned in the source text. The model accurately identified, listed and described all relevant application areas for the Carbon Dots used in the article. | Structural Integrity: The output matches the required JSON schema perfectly. Complex nested arrays (such as precursors/dopants and application domains) were populated correctly without truncating list items or breaking the syntax.
